creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, 

Subversion 1.8 no longer uses neon to fetch files via http, one needs serf now to do 
the same. In addition svn.freebsd.org should not be used to checkout your sources, 
you should use svn0.us-west.freebsd.org or svn0.us-east.freebsd.org: 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/svn-mirrors.html 

Thanks, 
remko
